profile.name: Ertuğrul AKKAYA
profile.title: Mobile Developer | Kotlin, Jetpack Compose & KMP
profile.bio: Results-driven Mobile Developer specializing in Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) for scalable Android and iOS applications. Backed by solid backend capabilities in ASP.NET Core and PostgreSQL to deliver seamless end-to-end integrations. Passionate about clean architecture, agile teamwork, and building maintainable products from scratch.

experiences.description: Field-Task App: Engineered an Android/iOS KMP app with Jetpack Compose, featuring real-time geolocation, QR-triggered execution, and rich-media capture for on-site reporting. IoT Integration: Developed an MQTT-based telemetry tracking solution with robust device provisioning and direct mobile Wi-Fi configuration. Architecture: Architected scalable codebases using Clean Architecture, MVVM, and Compose Multiplatform to maximize UI code-sharing and native performance. Full-Stack Support: Integrated ASP.NET Core & PostgreSQL APIs, optimizing payloads and implementing push notifications for instant updates.
Supported native Android development, RESTful API integrations, and actively participated in agile debugging phases.

projects.name: Portfolio
projects.description: Personal portfolio web app built with KMP and Compose Multiplatform. Clean Architecture, MVVM, Koin DI, responsive Material 3 UI with dark/light theme. Targets Web (JS/WasmJS) and Android.

projects.name: SpaceExplorer
projects.description: Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) application for tracking space launches. Features offline-first architecture with Room database, Clean Architecture + MVVM patterns, and Compose Multiplatform UI for Android & iOS. Uses Ktor for networking, Koin for DI, and includes Lottie animations.

projects.name: FoodAppKMP
projects.description: Architected a cross-platform food ordering application, achieving high UI/UX consistency across both Android and iOS environments through a highly optimized shared codebase.

projects.name: ContactApp
projects.description: Developed a fully modular Android application following Clean Architecture and an event-driven state management approach (unidirectional data flow). Implemented use-case-driven domain logic, single source of truth state handling with Kotlin Flow, and dependency injection via Hilt to ensure testability and scalability.

projects.name: bsStoreApp (Backend REST API)
projects.description: Built a robust and scalable RESTful API for an e-commerce platform, handling complex operations including pagination and API versioning.

leadership.organization: Google Developer Student Clubs, Düzce University
leadership.description: Led development teams for 2 mobile apps and 1 game project. Organized technical events and mentored junior developers.
achievements: Led teams for 2 apps & 1 game; achieved 4th place in hackathon
Mentored 20+ members and organized 5+ events to boost engagement
Certified Core Member of GDSC Düzce University
